description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a white exterior and horizontal siding, featuring a red sloped shed roof. The front facade is adorned with a decorative cornice, a single red door with a window, and a large rectangular window to the left of the entry. The house sits on a raised beige foundation with a small set of steps leading up to the door. The side and rear walls are plain, each with a single window, and the roof slopes downward from front to back. The overall design is simple and compact, with minimal ornamentation except for the front cornice detail.
description: A compact, single-story white house with a red shed roof, decorative front cornice, and a red door with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative cornice, red door with window, large front window, and entry steps.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain white siding, sloped red roof, and absence of windows or doors on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single small window and the continuation of the red shed roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and plain white siding under the sloped roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Single red door with window, small set of steps, and decorative cornice above the entry.
